prompt: In THIS project (burrow), where is the static-document report instruction (no greetings/sign-offs) CURRENTLY enforced — only in the user prompt, or in the synthesis system prompt? Answer in one sentence.
memory_topic: synthesis static-document instruction system prompt vs user prompt current enforcement
_note: Currency pair (REFINEMENT, subtler): instruction in the user prompt (superseded, commit ae23ccbc) -> built into the system prompt for authority (accepted, later commit). Verified at burrow HEAD d641966: pkg/synthesis/synthesis.go builds `fullSystem` and appends staticDocumentInstruction, then provider.Complete(fullSystem, userPrompt). Grader is coverage-based (Lesson 9fc21dc0): the verdict is must_include_any(system prompt); stale markers are diagnostic only and may false-positive since a correct answer can mention 'user prompt' in contrast.
